title: Claudia Winkleman's New TV Show Gets Mixed Reviews
summary: Claudia Winkleman started a new talk show on BBC One. She is a famous TV host from shows like The Traitors. On her first show, she talked to guests like Jeff Goldblum, Vanessa Williams, Jennifer Saunders, and Tom Allen. Critics had different opinions about the show. Some liked it and gave it five stars, saying it was fun and friendly. Others did not like it as much, giving it two or three stars and calling it boring or messy. The show is part of Claudia's big career on TV, and people are watching to see if it gets better over time. The guests talked about their new projects, like music, movies, and books.

background_read: Claudia Winkleman is a well-known TV presenter in the UK. She has hosted popular shows like Strictly Come Dancing and The Traitors. A talk show is a type of TV program where a host interviews celebrities and chats with them about their lives and work. Critics are experts who watch shows and write reviews to tell people if they are good or not. Reviews can have star ratings, with more stars meaning better. This article talks about how Claudia's new show got mixed reviews from different critics, with some liking it and others not.
Article_Structure: WHO: Claudia Winkleman, a TV host, and guests like Jeff Goldblum and Jennifer Saunders.
WHAT: A new talk show that aired on BBC One and received mixed reviews from critics.
WHERE: On BBC One, a TV channel in the UK.
WHY: To see how Claudia's new show is received and if it will improve over time.

perspectives.description: Some critics liked the show for being fun and friendly, giving it high star ratings.
Other critics thought the show was boring or messy, giving it lower star ratings.
